diffs.diff:
--- a/test_walk.py
+++ b/test_walk.py
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+import os, time, gymnasium as gym, humanoid_bench, numpy as np

+from stable_baselines3 import PPO

+from stable_baselines3.common.vec_env import DummyVecEnv, VecNormalize

+

+TASK = "h1hand-walk-v0"

+STEPS = 100000

+

+def make_env():

+    def _init():

+        return gym.make(TASK)

+    return _init

+

+env = DummyVecEnv([make_env()])

+env = VecNormalize(env, norm_obs=True, norm_reward=False, clip_obs=10.)

+

+model = PPO(

+    "MlpPolicy", env,

+    verbose=1,

+    device="cuda",

+    policy_kwargs=dict(net_arch=[512, 512], log_std_init=-2),

+    use_sde=True,

+    sde_sample_freq=64,

+    n_steps=4096,

+    batch_size=256,

+    n_epochs=10,

+    learning_rate=1e-4,

+    gamma=0.99,

+    gae_lambda=0.95,

+    clip_range=0.2,

+    ent_coef=0.01,

+)

+start = time.time()

+model.learn(total_timesteps=STEPS)

+elapsed = time.time() - start

+print(f"Training done in {elapsed:.1f}s")

+

+model.save("/workspace/ckpt/test_walk")

+env.save("/workspace/ckpt/test_walk_vecnormalize.pkl")

+env.close()

+

+# quick deterministic eval on 2 seeds

+env = DummyVecEnv([make_env()])

+env = VecNormalize.load("/workspace/ckpt/test_walk_vecnormalize.pkl", env)

+env.training = False

+env.norm_reward = False

+model = PPO.load("/workspace/ckpt/test_walk")

+for seed in [0, 1]:

+    env.seed(seed)

+    obs = env.reset()

+    ep_r = 0.0

+    for _ in range(1000):

+        action, _ = model.predict(obs, deterministic=True)

+        obs, reward, done, info = env.step(action)

+        ep_r += float(reward[0])

+        if done[0]:

+            break

+    print(f"Seed {seed} episode reward: {ep_r:.2f}")

+env.close()
